hero.title: Source Verified Indian Products. Export With Confidence.
hero.subtitle: Trivoxa connects international buyers with vetted Indian manufacturing partners across textiles, food, building materials, healthcare, and industrial goods—managed from sourcing to shipment.

about.heading: A Vision Beyond Business.
about.p1: Trivoxa Group was founded with a long-term vision: to build an organization that creates lasting value through international trade, innovation, and strategic partnerships.
about.p2: Today, we operate through global sourcing, product exports, and professional services. Tomorrow, we will continue expanding into new industries, new markets, and new opportunities while remaining committed to trust, quality, and excellence.
about.p3: We believe meaningful businesses are not measured only by revenue, but by the value they create, the relationships they build, and the impact they leave behind.

values.curiosityDesc: We stay curious about markets, industries, and better ways to build.
values.integrityDesc: Trust is earned through honesty, transparency, and consistency.
values.innovationDesc: We embrace new ideas, technology, and continuous improvement.
values.growthDesc: We create space for ambitious people to grow with the company.

careers.heading: Build What's Next With Us
careers.p1: Every great organization is built by people who believe in creating something larger than themselves.
careers.p2: At Trivoxa, we're building a culture driven by curiosity, integrity, innovation, and continuous growth—where ambitious people come together to create meaningful impact across global industries.

finalCta.heading: The Next Great Partnership Starts Here.
finalCta.lead: Whether you're looking to source products, expand into new markets, or collaborate on innovative solutions, Trivoxa Group is ready to help you move forward with confidence.
